title: Is it Wise to Retain SBA Communications (SBAC) Stock for Now?
text: SBA Communications' (SBAC) is expected to gain from the rising global demand for wireless connectivity and its asset buyouts. High customer concentration and rising interest rates are key woes.

title: Cell Tower REITs Are Finally on Sale
text: When the latest bull market began cooling off amid a declining economy, soaring inflation and rising interest rates, many value investors started looking for bargains.
